heading: Reevaluation of nuclear fuel cycle
label: 3224 Reevaluation of nuclear fuel cycle
text: The President shall take immediate initiatives to invite all nuclear supplier and recipient nations to reevaluate all aspects of the nuclear fuel cycle, with emphasis on alternatives to an economy based on the separation of pure plutonium or the presence of high enriched uranium, methods to deal with spent fuel storage, and methods to improve the safeguards for existing nuclear technology. The President shall, in the first report required by , detail the progress of such international reevaluation.section 3281 of this title
notes: Effective DateSection effective , except as otherwise provided and regardless of any requirements for the promulgation of implementing regulations, see , set out as a note under .Mar. 10, 1978section 603(c) of Pub. L. 95–242section 3201 of this title

Delegation of FunctionsSecretary of State responsible for performing functions vested in President under this section, see section 2(a) of Ex. Ord. No. 12058, , 43 F.R. 20947, set out as a note under .May 11, 1978section 3201 of this title
